author: StevieTheTV
text: Liverpool 2026/27 Season - Iraola Officially Confirmed4 hours agovia mobileBaNgoglikes thisReplyQuoteSelect PostDeselect PostLink to PostMemberGive GiftBack to TopPost by StevieTheTV on4 hours agoSome truly pessimistic takes on the season ahead in here. I’m fully expecting a strong title push this season and I think it’ll be a big disappointment if it doesn’t materialize.We’re bringing in a very highly rated manager with a style of play that the league is begging for a top team to implement to sweep away the dross that is Arsenal’s football.This on top of a base which won the league a season ago, lost some key attacking components but also had £400M+ lavished on it with more to come this season.We’re not facing prime Man City here. We should be strongly challenging.
